diagrams.title: Bellman-Ford Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process of Bellman-Ford algorithm including initialization, iterations, and negative cycle detection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding algorithm flow and decision points

diagrams.title: Edge Relaxation Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how edge relaxation updates distance values when a shorter path is found
elements: Vertex v with current distance d(v)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the core operation of finding shorter paths through intermediate vertices

diagrams.title: Bellman-Ford vs Dijkstra Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of key features between Bellman-Ford and Dijkstra algorithms
elements: Bellman-Ford: O(VE) time, handles negatives, DP approach
Dijkstra: O(E+VlogV) time, non-negative only, greedy approach
Both: Single-source shortest path, use relaxation concept
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for algorithm selection and understanding differences
